fields.name: debit_credit_instructions
fields.description: Collection of debit/credit instruction batches from investments department to accounts department

children.name: instruction_id
children.description: Unique identifier for this batch of debit/credit instructions

children.name: timestamp
children.description: When this instruction batch was created

children.name: source_department
children.description: Originating department; always 'investments' for this message type

children.name: target_department
children.description: Receiving department responsible for executing the instructions; always 'accounts' for this message type

children.name: instructions
children.description: Individual debit or credit transaction instructions within this batch

children.name: transaction_id
children.description: Unique identifier for this individual transaction instruction

children.name: account_number
children.description: IBAN of the account to be debited or credited

children.name: instruction_type
children.description: Direction of the transaction: debit (money out) or credit (money in)

children.name: amount
children.description: Transaction amount in the specified currency

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the transaction

children.name: description
children.description: Business narrative explaining the purpose of the transaction (e.g. fund redemption, dividend distribution, portfolio rebalancing)

children.name: fund_id
children.description: Unique identifier of the investment fund associated with this transaction

children.name: fund_name
children.description: Human-readable name of the investment fund

children.name: effective_date
children.description: Date on which the transaction should be executed in the accounts system

children.name: status
children.description: Current processing status of this individual instruction

children.name: total_debit_amount
children.description: Sum of all debit amounts in this batch

children.name: total_credit_amount
children.description: Sum of all credit amounts in this batch

children.name: batch_reference
children.description: Unique reference identifier for this batch, used for reconciliation and audit trails

children.name: approval_status
children.description: Authorization status of the entire batch

children.name: approver
children.description: Email address of the person who approved this batch

children.name: approval_timestamp
children.description: When the batch was approved
